entries.source: "What should I be careful not to romanticize?"
entries.value: "Ninapaswa kuwa mwangalifu nisitukuze nini kupita kiasi?"

entries.source: "What were your real options at this moment?"
entries.value: "Chaguo zako halisi zilikuwa zipi wakati huu?"

entries.source: "What would people in your time assume that modern readers might miss?"
entries.value: "Watu wa wakati wako wangekisia nini ambacho wasomaji wa leo wanaweza kukikosa?"

entries.source: "What would your critics say about your choices?"
entries.value: "Wakosoaji wako wangesema nini kuhusu maamuzi yako?"

entries.source: "Which parts of your story are well documented?"
entries.value: "Ni sehemu zipi za hadithi yako zimeandikwa vizuri kwa ushahidi?"

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: mkosoaji;

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: mwanahistoria wa kisasa;

entries.source: a primary source excerpt to evaluate.
entries.value: dondoo la chanzo cha msingi la kutathmini.

entries.source: a rival;
entries.value: mpinzani;

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Jibu la kihistoria la AI lenye manufaa linapaswa kuwa na tabaka mbili.

entries.source: AI historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.
entries.value: Mazungumzo ya kihistoria ya AI yanaweza kusaidia yakishughulikiwa kwa uangalifu.

entries.source: AI roleplay
entries.value: Uigizaji wa majukumu kwa AI

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: mtu wa kawaida aliyeathiriwa na uamuzi;

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Iombe AI iweke lebo ya kutokuwa na uhakika.

entries.source: Character voice plus evidence notes
entries.value: Sauti ya mhusika pamoja na maelezo ya ushahidi

entries.source: Continue the route
entries.value: Endelea na njia

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Tarehe na muhtasari ni muhimu, lakini wanafunzi mara nyingi huhitaji njia ya kuingia katika hali ya kibinadamu: watu waliamini nini, waliona chaguo zipi, mipaka gani iliwaathiri, na mambo gani hawangeweza kuyajua.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Kwa mfano, mwanafunzi anayesoma demokrasia anaweza kuzungumza na Ambedkar, kisha kumwomba Source Critic atathmini hotuba au kifungu cha katiba. Mwanafunzi anayesoma jiji anaweza kuanza na Geography Explorer ili kuelewa mahali, kisha kuingia kwenye mazungumzo ya kihistoria.

entries.source: Good guardrails for students
entries.value: Miongozo mizuri ya usalama kwa wanafunzi

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Uigizaji wa kihistoria unaweza kufanya muktadha, chaguo, na mawazo yawe rahisi kukumbuka unapotenganisha ubunifu na ushahidi.

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Uigizaji wa kihistoria una nguvu hasa wanafunzi wanapolinganisha mitazamo. Baada ya kuzungumza na mtu mmoja, omba mtazamo mwingine:

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.
entries.value: Historia huwa ya kukumbukika zaidi bila kujifanya kutokuwa na uhakika kumetoweka.

entries.source: History is easier to remember when it feels inhabited.
entries.value: Historia ni rahisi kukumbuka inapohisi kama inaishi.

entries.source: Learning history by talking to historical figures with AI
entries.value: Kujifunza historia kwa kuzungumza na watu wa kihistoria kwa AI

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Tenganisha madai ya ndani ya mhusika na maelezo ya ushahidi.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Anza na Talk to a Historical Person kwa mazungumzo yanayoongozwa na mhusika. Tumia Time Travel kwa safari ya mahali na kipindi. Soma mwongozo wa Talk to a Historical Person au vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Time Travel ikiwa unataka mtiririko uliopangwa zaidi.

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Kuzungumza na mhusika wa kihistoria si ufikiaji wa kichawi wa zamani. Ni muundo wa kujifunza.

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Mchanganyiko huo una manufaa zaidi kuliko safu yoyote peke yake. Muhtasari wa kawaida wa ensaiklopidia unaweza kusahaulika. Uigizaji wa majukumu pekee unaweza kupotosha. Sauti pamoja na ushahidi huunda eneo bora zaidi la kujifunza.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Hivyo ndivyo inspir inavyokaribia mazungumzo ya kihistoria: kadi ya persona, jibu la ndani ya mhusika, na maelezo ya muktadha yanayounganisha ubunifu na ushahidi.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Aina hiyo ya kuuliza maswali hugeuza historia kutoka orodha kuwa muktadha.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AI inapaswa kutenganisha mhusika na ushahidi. Inaweza kujibu kwa sauti iliyo na msingi wa kihistoria, lakini pia inapaswa kuongeza maelezo wakati rekodi hazijakamilika, tafsiri zinatofautiana, au jibu ni ujenzi upya.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Safu ya kwanza ni uigizaji wa majukumu. Inaweza kuzungumza kwa sauti inayofikika, kueleza motisha, na kufanya hali ionekane hai. Hii ndiyo sehemu inayosaidia kumbukumbu.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Muundo hufanya kazi kwa sababu unawaruhusu wanafunzi kuuliza maswali kama:

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Lengo si kuifanya AI iwe mamlaka. Lengo ni kuwafanya wanafunzi waulize maswali bora ya kihistoria.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: Ahadi si kwamba AI inaweza kuita zamani. Haiwezi. Ahadi ni kwamba uigizaji wa majukumu unaweza kufanya muktadha uwe rahisi kuuliza, kulinganisha, na kukumbuka wakati uzoefu umetenganishwa wazi na ushahidi.

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: Kanuni ya usalama

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: Safu ya pili ni maelezo ya ushahidi. Inapaswa kusema wakati jambo limerekodiwa moja kwa moja, limetafsiriwa kwa upana, linabishaniwa, au limejengwa upya kwa ajili ya kujifunza. Hii ndiyo sehemu inayolinda usahihi.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Maswali imara zaidi si maswali ya trivia. Ni maswali ya muktadha.

entries.source: The useful part of historical roleplay
entries.value: Sehemu yenye manufaa ya uigizaji wa kihistoria

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: Maswali haya humsaidia mwanafunzi kuona historia kama seti ya shinikizo na tafsiri badala ya mchezo wa mavazi. Pia huiweka AI kuwa mwaminifu. Kadiri mwanafunzi anavyouliza zaidi kuhusu ushahidi, mipaka, na mtazamo, ndivyo kipindi kinavyopungua uwezekano wa kuwa fantasia inayovaa jina maarufu.

entries.source: Try prompts like:
entries.value: Jaribu vidokezo kama:

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: Tumia uigizaji wa kihistoria wa AI kwa kanuni tatu:

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: Itumie kwa ulinganisho

entries.source: Verify important facts with trusted sources, textbooks, or teacher-provided materials.
entries.value: Thibitisha ukweli muhimu kwa vyanzo vinavyoaminika, vitabu vya kiada, au nyenzo zilizotolewa na mwalimu.

entries.source: What choices were available?
entries.value: Ni chaguo gani zilizokuwepo?

entries.source: What did their society assume?
entries.value: Jamii yao ilichukulia nini kuwa kawaida?

entries.source: What did this person care about?
entries.value: Mtu huyu alijali nini?

entries.source: What to ask a historical figure
entries.value: Cha kumuuliza mhusika wa kihistoria

entries.source: What would modern readers misunderstand?
entries.value: Wasomaji wa kisasa wangeelewa vibaya nini?

entries.source: Which parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain?
entries.value: Ni sehemu gani zimeandikwa vizuri na ni sehemu gani hazina uhakika?

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Unaweza kujaribu muundo katika Talk to a Historical Person. Ikiwa unataka mandhari pana kabla ya kukutana na mtu, tumia Time Travel kutembelea kipindi, kuchunguza vikwazo, kisha kuuliza watu walikuwa na chaguo gani kweli.
